source_packet.score_files: inter_output/CLID/*.txt plus inter_output/{PIA,SecMI,PFAMI}/*.txt; CLID is the official directory casing
source_packet.row_contract: numeric score rows only; official evaluator skips the first line

boundary.summary: Strong official CPU score-packet replay, but prompt-conditioned and not image-identity-safe.
allowed_claims: official CLiD intermediate score packet replays on CPU with strong target metrics
the result is useful Research candidate evidence for text-conditioned black-box membership
the packet can guide future identity-safe protocol design
blocked_claims: replacement for the admitted recon row

promotion_blockers: public score rows are numeric-only and do not contain COCO image IDs, captions, file names, URLs, split IDs, or row IDs
public GitHub tree does not contain data/impt_metadata or equivalent row manifest files
Hugging Face mia_COCO.zip remains inaccessible to authenticated HEAD and Range requests in the 2026-05-15 live recheck
prompt-conditioned CLiD semantics need a product-bridge handoff before any Platform/Runtime consumption

hf_access_recheck.decision: no central-directory inspection and no download

reopen_conditions: authors publish a row manifest mapping each inter_output row to immutable COCO image identity, caption/text, target/shadow split, and member/nonmember role
HF gated access permits metadata-only central-directory or manifest inspection without downloading image payloads
a product-bridge handoff defines how prompt-conditioned CLiD differs from the admitted recon black-box row
stop_conditions: do not download mia_COCO.zip, COCO_MIA_ori_split1, images, Stable Diffusion weights, target/shadow checkpoints, or generated images
do not run CLiD GPU jobs, XGBoost sweeps, prompt-shuffle matrices, or new prompt-control experiments from this card alone
do not add CLiD to admitted-evidence-bundle.json
